> If I have questions about your feature request or when your reported feature rewuest is implemented,
> I will reply in this thread with the question or the request to test the feature.
>
> Please reply and help me test your requested feature, as you know best how what to expect.
> This will make ReaSonus a better product.
>
> When not replying to any of my questions or requests might make me remove the requested feature.
> This because too many people are not responding.
>
> Thanx for your understanding
